'''jagolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibuproxam|ibuproxam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibuproxam|ibuproxam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jagolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jægeleth|jægeleth]] || [[word:jægelej|jægelej]] || [[word:jægelesh|jægelesh]] || [[word:jægele|jægele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jagogoloth|jagogoloth]] || [[word:jagogoloj|jagogoloj]] || [[word:jagogolosh|jagogolosh]] || [[word:jagogolo|jagogolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jagoloth|jagoloth]] || [[word:jagoloj|jagoloj]] || [[word:jagolosh|jagolosh]] || [[word:jagolo|jagolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jagofloth|jagofloth]] || [[word:jagofloj|jagofloj]] || [[word:jagoflosh|jagoflosh]] || [[word:jagoflof|jagoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jagolotho|jagolotho]] || [[word:jagolojo|jagolojo]] || [[word:jagolosho|jagolosho]] || [[word:jagoloko|jagoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jagoloth|jagoloth]] || [[word:jagoloj|jagoloj]] || [[word:jagolosh|jagolosh]] || [[word:jagolo|jagolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jagolothol|jagolothol]] || [[word:jagolojol|jagolojol]] || [[word:jagoloshol|jagoloshol]] || [[word:jagolokol|jagolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jagolothotho|jagolothotho]] || [[word:jagolojojo|jagolojojo]] || [[word:jagoloshosho|jagoloshosho]] || [[word:jagoloko|jagoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jagolothon|jagolothon]] || [[word:jagolojon|jagolojon]] || [[word:jagoloshon|jagoloshon]] || [[word:jagolokon|jagolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jagolothoro|jagolothoro]] || [[word:jagolojoro|jagolojoro]] || [[word:jagoloshoro|jagoloshoro]] || [[word:jagolokoro|jagolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
